name: poisson-disc

metadata.name: poisson-disc
metadata.summary: Poisson disc sampling in arbitrary dimensions using Bridson's algorithm, implemented in python using numpy and scipy. Generates so-called "blue noise" that prevents clustering by ensuring each two points are at least "radius" apart.

documentation:
# Poisson disc sampling
Poisson disc sampling in arbitrary dimensions using Bridson's algorithm, implemented in python using ``numpy`` and ``scipy``.

Generates so-called "blue noise" that prevents clustering by ensuring each two points are at least ``radius`` apart.

https://www.cs.ubc.ca/~rbridson/docs/bridson-siggraph07-poissondisk.pdf

Implementation is located in ``poisson_disc.py``, while ``poisson_disc_sampling.ipynb`` contains some examples. 

Available through PyPI as ``poisson_disc``, https://pypi.org/project/poisson-disc/

modules.name: poisson_disc
documentation: Poisson disc sampling in arbitrary dimensions via Bridson algorithm
Based on 2D sampling by Nicolas P. Rougier - https://github.com/rougier/numpy-book

functions.name: poisson_disc.hypersphere_volume_sample
documentation: Based on Matlab implementation by Roger Stafford
Can be optimized for Bridson algorithm by excluding all points within the r/2 sphere

functions.name: poisson_disc.hypersphere_surface_sample
documentation: Uniform sampling on the sphere's surface
